name: MW Restaurant
tagline: Chef Wade Ueoka's elevated take on local comfort food — the ahi cake and foie gras loco moco are iconic Honolulu dishes.
talkStory: Husband-and-wife team Chef Wade Ueoka and pastry chef Michelle Karr-Ueoka opened MW in 2013 after both spent years at Alan Wong's flagship. Wade's ahi cake — layers of seared ahi, avocado, and wontons — won 'Best Dish' at multiple Hale 'Aina awards. Michelle, who also does Senia's pastry program, trained at Thomas Keller's Per Se and French Laundry. The foie gras loco moco is a $30 riff on a $5 plate-lunch staple that somehow works perfectly. James Beard semifinalists.
